name: Duneshade Outpost
approach: Low walls, shade sails, cistern towers, and signal posts mark a settlement built to survive heat, scarcity, and sudden attack.
arrival_signals: Fortified hot-edge outpost where route captains, water-ration families, and predator-watch crews hold the desertward lanes of the Unternal supply belt.
Travel rhythm changes as one crosses into the locality’s own rules, pace, and expectations.
